message:
fix(c-api): use copy_nonoverlapping for size-prefix allocator to avoid unaligned UB

The libc_malloc/libc_free wrapper stored the allocation size by casting
the pointer to `*mut usize` and using `.write()`/`.read()`, which
technically requires pointer alignment. Replace with
`copy_nonoverlapping` on native-endian bytes and extract constants
for header size/alignment to eliminate potential undefined behavior on
platforms with strict alignment requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
